title: fumaria officinalis subsp. cilicica
intro: Fumaria officinalis subsp. cilicica, also known as Cilician fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. The health benefits of Fumaria officinalis subsp. cilicica include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to prevent cancer. Fumaria officinalis subsp. cilicica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine in various regions, including the Middle East and Mediterranean.
